segments.text: I have never seen Mark make a mistake in a situation like that, and it happens, 5, 4, 3, 2, trying to go for a thunder, but that's it, that's it, he bet it all, but came out losing, gambled hard and lose hard, and look at that, definitely a heart breaker.
I got that same look on my face when I play online poker, I understand, I understand the gamble and not getting the payoff, I hate it had to be Mark, but oh my god, that quick attack.

full_text: I have never seen Mark make a mistake in a situation like that, and it happens, 5, 4, 3, 2, trying to go for a thunder, but that's it, that's it, he bet it all, but came out losing, gambled hard and lose hard, and look at that, definitely a heart breaker. I got that same look on my face when I play online poker, I understand, I understand the gamble and not getting the payoff, I hate it had to be Mark, but oh my god, that quick attack.
